questions.prompt: I'm going to get up and have ____.
questions.context_sentence: I'm going to get up and have breakfast.
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：break(打破) + fast(禁食)——打破一整夜的禁食，所以第一顿饭是早餐。

questions.prompt: Look, there are some ducks on the ____.
questions.context_sentence: Look, there are some ducks on the pond.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法：“胖的”——胖胖的鸭子喜欢在池塘（pond）里游泳。

questions.prompt: Hey, there are some ____ clouds in the sky.

questions.context_sentence: Let's look at the weather tomorrow.

questions.prompt: It will be cold and ____ in Xi'an...
questions.context_sentence: It will be cold and windy in Xi'an...
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：wind(风) + y(形容词后缀，表示多...的)——多风的。

questions.context_sentence: It will be cold and windy in Xi'an...

questions.prompt: I'm going to play chess and I'll be the ____!
questions.context_sentence: I'm going to play chess and I'll be the winner!
questions.hint: 词根词缀法：win(赢) + n + er(人)——赢得比赛的人就是获胜者。

questions.context_sentence: I'm going to play chess and I'll be the winner!

questions.context_sentence: At half past twelve.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法：half(一半) + past(经过)——时间走过了一个小时的一半，就是半点钟。
